title: Punishment Room
writer: Keiji Hasebe, Shintarô Ishihara, Natto Wada
actors: Hiroshi Kawaguchi, Keizô Kawasaki, Seiji Miyaguchi
plot: Nothing less than a phenomenal, astonishing and pioneering film. This spectacle of an angry, ego-driven youth tormented by his own emotional impotence, low self-esteem and resentment towards his parents.
